app.title: Agent Task Console
app.subtitle: Local AI engineering control
repository.title: Local Repository
repository.name: Repository name
tasks.title: Task Workbench
tasks.overview.title: Create, observe, and review Agent tasks
tasks.overview.body: Each task runs in an isolated worktree, with model, mode, permissions, and storage boundaries confirmed before launch.
tasks.list.title: Recent tasks
tasks.list.empty: No real task records yet. Select a repository and create a task to populate this list from the database.
tasks.chat.userBody: Fix the payment precision bug and add matching unit tests.
tasks.chat.agentBody: I will inspect the amount calculation path, test coverage, and recent changes before working in an isolated worktree.
tasks.chat.contractBody: Mode AGENT, model GPT-5 Codex, balanced strength; main workspace is read-only and high-risk commands require approval.
tasks.execution.title: Complete S6 and preview the UI design
tasks.execution.subtitle: Execution records, command output, code changes, and environment state in one place.
tasks.execution.noTaskBody: Select a historical task, or create a new task from a real Git repository.
tasks.execution.lead: I will show the task like the Codex desktop execution flow: explain what changed, list commands that ran, and show code changes by file.
tasks.execution.agentNoTask: Select a real task before starting the Agent cycle.
tasks.execution.diffNoTask: There is no persisted task record to generate a real diff yet. Create or select a real task first.
tasks.execution.diffLargeCollapsed: This file diff is large, so it is collapsed by default to keep the page responsive.
tasks.execution.diffNoSource: No real diff artifact has been generated yet.
tasks.execution.diff.taskOverview: Adds execution flow, command cards, code change list, and follow-up composer.
tasks.execution.diff.newTaskDialog: Keeps model, strength, permission, and mode controls for task startup.
tasks.execution.diff.styles: Reworks the light Codex desktop layout, command cards, and environment panel.
tasks.execution.diff.i18n: Adds execution record, environment, and settings copy.
tasks.execution.deliveryNoTask: There is no persisted task record to generate a real delivery report yet. Create or select a real task first.
tasks.execution.deliveryEmpty: No real delivery report has been generated yet.
tasks.execution.noValidationRounds: No failure analysis or repair rounds yet.
tasks.execution.commandLogEmpty: No log content in this page.
tasks.execution.commandLogNoTask: Task id is required to read command logs.
tasks.execution.mergeNoTask: There is no persisted task record to merge yet. Create or select a real task first.
tasks.execution.mergePrecheckRequired: Refresh the real merge precheck first.
tasks.execution.mergeBlocked: Merge precheck did not pass. Resolve the blockers first.
tasks.execution.mergeAlreadyMerged: This task has already been merged locally.
tasks.execution.mergeConflictSummary: The merge hit conflicts. The target branch was protected and the merge was stopped.
tasks.execution.mergeStale: The current task changed. Refresh the merge precheck before confirming.
tasks.execution.mergeValidationFailed: Latest validation did not pass, so merge is blocked by default.
tasks.execution.mergeValidationNotRun: No validation command has been recorded, so merge is blocked by default.
tasks.execution.mergeConfirmBody: Confirm the final diff, validation result, and commit message. This only runs a local Git merge and will not push to a remote.
tasks.execution.mergeBlockerTargetDirty: The target workspace has uncommitted changes. Resolve them before merging.
tasks.execution.mergeBlockerValidation: Validation has not passed or has not run, so merge is blocked by default.
tasks.execution.mergeBlockerDiff: The final diff is empty, so there is nothing to merge.
tasks.environment.title: Environment
tasks.proof.title: Delivery evidence
tasks.proof.body: S6 exposes the key evidence entries needed for the task loop.
tasks.proof.privacyBody: Preview context and data flow before launch.
tasks.proof.logsBody: stdout, stderr, and validation results stay traceable.
tasks.proof.worktreeBody: Agent writes only inside the task worktree.
tasks.new.title: Start Agent task
tasks.new.subtitle: Confirm model, mode, strength, and access permissions before the task starts.
tasks.new.descriptionPlaceholder: Example: fix the payment precision bug and add matching unit tests.
tasks.new.runContractBody: Mode, model, permissions, validation commands, storage path, and output language are fixed before launch.
tasks.new.mode.title: Mode
tasks.new.mode.agentBody: Let Agent plan, edit, verify, and repair in a loop.
tasks.new.mode.planBody: Produce a plan and wait for your approval.
tasks.new.mode.reviewBody: Review risks, gaps, and delivery evidence.
tasks.new.model.title: Model
tasks.new.model.gpt5.description: Best for complex engineering tasks and high-confidence code edits.
tasks.new.model.deepseek.description: Cost-effective for coding tasks and domestic deployment scenarios.
tasks.new.model.local.description: For private or offline OpenAI-compatible services.
tasks.new.permissions.workspaceBody: Main workspace stays read-only until merge.
tasks.new.permissions.networkBody: Off by default; enable explicitly when needed.
tasks.new.validationCommandPlaceholder: Auto-detect, or enter e.g. npm run test
tasks.new.storage.title: Transparent storage
tasks.new.errorRepository: Select a local Git repository first.
tasks.new.errorWorktreeMissing: Task record was created without a worktree path, so the Agent cannot be registered.
approvals.title: Approval Center
approvals.body: High-risk commands suspend the task first. They only continue after you approve; rejecting or requesting changes blocks the operation.
approvals.commentPlaceholder: Add the reason for approving, rejecting, or requesting changes.
approvals.emptyBody: High-risk commands, permission escalations, and merge actions appear here.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage models, modes, permissions, storage, memory, appearance, and language.
settings.general.title: General
settings.general.body: Choose how Codex works, its default permissions, and common open targets.
settings.general.workModeBody: Choose how many technical details Codex shows
settings.general.everydayBody: Equally powerful with fewer technical details
settings.general.defaultPermissionBody: By default, Codex can read and edit files in its workspace. It can request extra access when needed.
settings.general.autoReviewBody: Codex can read and edit workspace files, then automatically review extra access requests.
settings.general.fullAccessBody: Can edit any file and run network commands without approval for fully trusted tasks.
settings.general.defaultFileTargetBody: Where files and folders open by default
settings.placeholder.body: This group uses the same Codex desktop settings layout and can be wired to real configuration later.
settings.models.title: Model Configuration
settings.models.body: Configure default models and OpenAI-compatible providers.
settings.models.keepExistingKey: Leave blank to keep the saved key
settings.models.apiKeyPreviewBody: Only a masked value is shown; plaintext is not written to logs or SQLite.
settings.models.connectionMissingConfig: No saved model configuration was found.
settings.models.connectionMissingBaseUrl: Base URL is required before testing the provider.
settings.models.connectionMissingApiKey: API Key is not configured. The saved model cannot be used yet.
settings.models.connectionConfigReady: Configuration is ready for an OpenAI-compatible request.
settings.health.title: Startup health
settings.health.body: Check the local pieces CodeMax needs before running real tasks.
settings.health.storageMissing: App data directory has not been created yet.
settings.health.databaseMissing: Database file has not been created yet.
settings.health.agentNotChecked: Agent runtime has not been checked in this view.
settings.permissions.title: Access Permissions
settings.permissions.body: Define what Agent can read, write, execute, and access by default.
settings.permissions.commandsValue: Validation commands allowed; high-risk commands need approval
settings.permissions.approvalsValue: Delete, dependency, push, and merge actions require confirmation
settings.modes.title: Mode Defaults
settings.modes.body: Set default boundaries for AGENT, PLAN, ASK, and REVIEW.
settings.storage.title: Storage and Cleanup
settings.storage.body: Large logs, screenshots, and temporary context are stored on disk; SQLite stores indexes and summaries.
settings.storage.cleanupConfirm: Clean temporary logs, screenshots, and context files? Permanent evidence will be kept.
settings.storage.cleanupBody: Only temporary logs, screenshots, and context files are cleanup targets. Proof packs, diffs, approvals, and merge records stay protected.
settings.memory.title: Memory Cockpit
settings.memory.body: Inspect recent messages, rolling summaries, long-term memory, and candidate preferences.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.body: Minimal is the default style, with multiple UI styles reserved.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.body: Control UI, Agent output, and proof pack language.
tasks.s12.title: S12 delivery intelligence
tasks.s12.summary: Compact proof, review, and risk signals for the current task.
tasks.s12.noTask: No persisted task is selected yet. Create or select a real task first.
tasks.s12.empty: No real evidence has been generated yet.
tasks.s12.proposals.title: Proposal cards
tasks.s12.proposals.minimal.title: Minimal delivery path
tasks.s12.proposals.minimal.summary: Choose the smallest deliverable path from generated evidence.
tasks.s12.proposals.hardened.title: Hardened review path
tasks.s12.proposals.hardened.summary: Require backend proof pack generation before merge for stricter audit trails.
tasks.s12.screenshots.title: Screenshots panel
tasks.s12.proofPack.title: Proof pack
tasks.s12.qualityGate.title: Quality gate
tasks.s12.qualityGate.tests.title: Validation commands
tasks.s12.qualityGate.proof.title: Evidence indexed
tasks.s12.qualityGate.proof.summary: Diff, report, screenshots, and notes are linked.
tasks.s12.qualityGate.approval.title: Approval posture
tasks.s12.qualityGate.approval.summary: Review any high-risk action before merge.
tasks.s12.deliveryScore.title: Delivery score
tasks.s12.deliveryScore.summary: Confidence is based on real validation, diff, approval, and evidence records.
tasks.s12.riskRadar.title: Risk radar
tasks.s12.riskRadar.backend.title: Backend proof API
tasks.s12.riskRadar.backend.summary: When evidence commands are unavailable, the UI reports the error instead of using static fallback data.
tasks.s12.riskRadar.storage.title: Artifact storage
tasks.s12.riskRadar.storage.summary: Large files remain referenced by path instead of embedded in state.
